message:
feat(sql): add PIVOT and UNPIVOT transformations

- Add PIVOT, UNPIVOT, FOR tokens
- Parse PIVOT (AGG(col) FOR col IN (...)) syntax
- Parse UNPIVOT (value_col FOR name_col IN (...)) syntax
- Execute PIVOT: group rows and aggregate into columns
- Execute UNPIVOT: convert columns to rows, skip NULLs
- Allow keywords as identifiers in UNPIVOT (e.g., 'month')
- Fix test: use ?? instead of || for falsy 0 handling
